title: Feature: add GET /api/activity endpoint
description: We need a way to see a recent activity feed across the whole platform — what tasks were created, which bugs changed status, which feature flags were toggled. The ActivityLog entity and repository already exist but there is no REST endpoint exposing them.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/activity returns the 50 most recent activity log entries, newest first
GET /api/activity?entityType=TASK filters to only task-related entries
GET /api/activity?entityType=BUG filters to only bug-related entries
Each entry includes: id, entityType, entityId, action, details, actor, timestamp
A new ActivityController class is created
Unit tests cover both the unfiltered and filtered cases
technical_notes: Create ActivityController and ActivityService. ActivityLogRepository already has findTop50ByOrderByTimestampDesc() and findByEntityTypeAndEntityId(). You may need to add findByEntityType(String entityType) to the repository.
